signal.title: Walmart Connect + Criteo expand offsite retail media inventory
signal.summary: Partnership deepens offsite commerce media—another pull of brand budgets toward closed retail graphs.
signal.rawExcerpt: Walmart Connect advertisers can activate shopper audiences across Criteo’s offsite network with unified reporting…

source.name: Retail Media Wire
source.description: Retail media network launches, measurement standards, and commerce media moves.
